npa.headerSub: Laws, decrees and orders regulating the sphere of physical culture and sports of the Kyrgyz Republic
npa.officialSourcesText: Full texts of regulatory acts are available on the portal cbd.minjust.gov.kg - Centralized Legal Information Database of KR, and on the Jogorku Kenesh website kenesh.kg.
npa.doc1Desc: The main law establishing the legal basis for the organization and management of physical culture and sports in the Kyrgyz Republic. Regulates the rights and obligations of athletes, coaches, judges, and organizations. In force as amended by Law of KR No. 21 of 21.01.2025.
npa.doc2Title: On Amendments and Additions to the Law of KR «On Physical Culture and Sports»
npa.doc3Title: On Additions to the Law of KR «On Physical Culture and Sports»
npa.doc4Title: On Amendment to the Law of KR «On Physical Culture and Sports»

npa.doc12Title: On Amendments to the Law of KR «On Physical Culture and Sports»
npa.doc13Title: On Approval of the Procedure for Registration of Persons Engaged in Professional Pedagogical and Training Activities
npa.doc13Desc: Establishes the procedure for registration of trainer-pedagogues at SAPCS. Defines the document package (5 documents), review period (15 business days), grounds for annulment. In force as amended by CM KR No. 786 of 08.12.2025.
npa.doc14Title: Unified Sports Classification of the Kyrgyz Republic for 2025–2028
npa.doc14Desc: Establishes standards and requirements for awarding sports titles and ranks: HMS KR, IWSM, SM KR, CMS, I–III ranks, youth ranks. Validity period: 2025–2028.
npa.doc15Desc: Official form of the registration certificate for persons engaged in professional pedagogical and training activities.
